description: Korea's largest OSAT (outsourced semiconductor assembly and test) company. Global OSAT rank #8 with $920M annual revenue (2024). Specializes in memory semiconductor packaging and testing: mobile DRAM Stack Chips, NAND packages, and silicon components. Major customers: Samsung Electronics, SK Hynix. Overseas subsidiaries: HT MICRON (Brazil), Hana Micron Vina (Vietnam). Founded 2001, KOSDAQ listed 2005. Awarded '2026 Asia Semiconductor Backend Solution Company of the Year'.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - wafer probing and dicing equipment for OSAT operations
Hanmi Semiconductor (CMP-0072) - TC bonders, packaging equipment
majorClients: Samsung Electronics (CMP-0018) - memory packaging and test
SK Hynix (CMP-0020) - memory packaging and test
_externalRelationships.notes: Korea #1 OSAT, global #8. 2025 Q3 cumulative: revenue +25.1% YoY, operating profit +71.3%. Vietnam subsidiary entering growth phase. Expanding into non-memory and automotive packaging. As Korea's largest OSAT performing wafer probing and dicing, HANA Micron is a key Accretech Korea customer. Market cap: 2,314.5B KRW.
